title: FORMINTERA RESIDENCE
desc:
⚡☀️ BIGGER POWER, STRONGER BACKUP!

Solarich brings another high-capacity solar solution to:
📍 FORMINTERA RESIDENCE
📌 Trece Martires, Cavite

Designed for maximum performance and total energy reliability 💯
🔧 SYSTEM DETAILS:
⚡ 11.875 kW Solar Power System
🔋 12 kW Hybrid Inverter
🔋 30.72 kWh Battery Storage

This setup is built to handle higher energy demands while ensuring stable and uninterrupted power—day and night 🌞🌙

✔️ Large-capacity battery for extended backup 🔋
✔️ Smart hybrid system for efficient energy use ⚡
✔️ Reduced electricity bills 💸
✔️ Reliable power even during outages

On-site, our skilled Solarich installers delivered clean, precise, at pulidong trabaho—making sure every panel and connection is installed with quality and care 👏🔧
Solid performance starts with solid installation!

Maraming salamat po sa tiwala, Formintera Residence! ☀️🤝

We’re honored to be part of your journey towards smarter and more reliable energy.
This is more than just solar—this is energy independence at its finest 🚀

📩 Message us today and upgrade your home with Solarich!
